leadText: Zacian (Japanese: ザシアン Zacian) is a Fairy-type Legendary Pokémon introduced in Generation VIII. While it is not known to evolve into or from any other Pokémon, Zacian has a second form activated by giving it a Rusted Sword to hold. Its original form, Hero of Many Battles, will then become the dual-type Fairy/Steel Crowned Sword. Zacian is the game mascot of Pokémon Sword, appearing on the game's boxart in its Crowned Sword form. Along with Zamazenta, Zacian is one of the legendary heroes, having played a role in stopping Eternatus during the Darkest Day.

sections.title: Biology
sections.text: Biology [ edit | edit source ] Zacian's dormant state (right) In its Hero of Many Battles form, Zacian is a large cyan lupine Pokémon with yellow eyes, a tan underside, a lean frame, a pink tail, and pink braids going down the side of its body. Two pink fringes of fur are present on its back. There are battle scars on its shoulders, hips, back, and forehead, which reveal a tan coloration under the blue fur. Half of its left ear is also missing. Zacian is believed to be either the elder sister or rival of Zamazenta . In the past, it was feared and respected by the people of Galar . 3000 years ago, it cooperated with Zamazenta and two young humans to save the region from Eternatus and the Darkest Day it created. Together, they defeated the Gigantic Pokémon and forced it back into slumber, which also caused pieces of its body imbued with its power to rain down throughout Galar in the form of Wishing Pieces and Wishing Stars . It can also turn itself into a statue and slumber for eons alongside Zamazenta in the Slumbering Weald . Zacian can also cast illusions, including a projection of itself, even while it is dormant. Additionally, it is capable of flying. Even though it is not capable of Dynamaxing , Zacian may still go berserk when bombarded by Galar particles . As years passed, both Zacian and Zamazenta were forgotten by history, but Professor Sonia proved their existence by writing her first book: Galar: A History , which details the discovery she and the player had in Stow-on-Side . Zacian is the only known Pokémon that can have Intrepid Sword as its Ability . Forms [ edit | edit source ] Zacian has two forms: Hero of Many Battles and Crowned Sword. Zacian can change into its Crowned Sword form by wielding its Rusted Sword , during which it absorbs metal particles in the air to transform its blade into a longer, golden sword resembling its colors. In its Crowned Sword form, the fringes of fur on its back become golden, wing-like armor, and its braids grow to resemble ribbons. Additionally, its head is covered by a golden helmet, when using Behemoth Blade , the armor on Zacian's back combines with the sword to increase its size and power. Zacian can sheathe its sword when not in use by wrapping it with its mane. Crowned Sword is Zacian's true, full power form, capable of cutting down anything in one strike. Its skills inspired awe in both its friends and foes. Along with Zamazenta in its Crowned Shield form, it can negate the mysterious power of Eternamax Eternatus , which prevents opposing Pokémon from attacking it. Zacian attacks with graceful, swift, and captivating movements, which have been compared to a dance. It unleashes quick slashes that cannot be seen by the naked eye; those struck by its sword will be cut down before they can feel the pain. The sword it holds in its mouth can cut through anything, even the thick scales of Dragon-type Pokémon, as if they were paper. According to legends, in this form, it was known as the Fairy King's Sword. Crowned Sword Zacian is the only known Pokémon capable of using the move Behemoth Blade . When it uses this attack, it is said to be able to split the ocean in two. [ 1 ] Zacian with its sword sheathed into one of its braids Zacian's sword transforming while it uses Behemoth Blade Hero of Many Battles Crowned Sword ↑ Zacian | Pokémon Sword and Pokémon Shield

In the core series [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon Sword : Zacian appears throughout the story at the Slumbering Weald in its Hero of Many Battles form, first appearing in its Crowned Sword form during the battle with Eternatus . In the post game, it can be caught. Pokémon Shield : Zacian first appears in the Slumbering Weald during the Darkest Day , during which it helps the player and Hop against Eternatus. In the post game, it is caught by Hop . Spoilers end here. Pokédex entries [ edit | edit source ] This Pokémon was unavailable prior to Generation VIII. Some say it's Zamazenta's elder sister—others say the two Pokémon are rivals. Crowned Sword Sword Now armed with a weapon it used in ancient times, this Pokémon needs only a single strike to fell even Gigantamax Pokémon. Shield Able to cut down anything with a single strike, it became known as the Fairy King's Sword, and it inspired awe in friend and foe alike. Moves marked with an asterisk (*) must be chain bred onto Zacian Bold indicates a move that gets STAB when used by Zacian Italic indicates a move that gets STAB only when used by an Evolution of Zacian Form change [ edit | edit source ] If Zacian knows Iron Head when it enters battle in its Crowned Sword form, Iron Head will become its signature move , Behemoth Blade , until the battle ends, where it becomes Iron Head again. Generation IX Other generations: VIII Event Move Type Cat. Pwr. Acc. PP Enter a battle with Iron Head in Crowned Sword form Behemoth Blade Steel Physical 100 100% 5 Zacian returns to Hero of Many Battles form Iron Head Steel Physical 80 100% 15 A superscript level indicates that Zacian can learn this move normally in Generation IX Bold indicates a move that gets STAB when used by Zacian Italic indicates a move that gets STAB only when used by an Evolution or alternate form of Zacian Side game data [ edit | edit source ] Hero of Many Battles [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon GO Base HP: 192 Base Attack: 254 Base Defense: 236 Egg Distance: N/A km Buddy Distance: 20 km Evolution Requirement: N/A Fast Attacks: Metal Claw , Snarl , Quick Attack , Fire Fang Charged Attacks: Play Rough , Wild Charge , Iron Head , Close Combat Zacian must know Iron Head in order to change into its Crowned Sword form. Crowned Sword [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon GO Base HP: 192 Base Attack: 332 Base Defense: 240 Egg Distance: N/A km Buddy Distance: 20 km Evolution Requirement: N/A Fast Attacks: Metal Claw , Air Slash Charged Attacks: Play Rough , Close Combat , Giga Impact , Behemoth Blade † While it cannot Dynamax , Crowned Sword Zacian can be used in Max Battles . However, it cannot be placed at Power Spots . Crowned Sword Zacian cannot be transferred , traded , or transferred to Pokémon HOME via the GO Transporter . Form data [ edit | edit source ] Zacian has two forms, Hero of Many Battles and Crowned Sword, which change its appearance, stats , type , and cry . Zacian will always be in its Hero of Many Battles form outside of battle . In battle, Zacian will be in its Crowned Sword form if it holds a Rusted Sword . In this form, Zacian gains Steel as a secondary type and has increased Attack and Speed . Additionally, if Zacian knows Iron Head , the move will be replaced with Behemoth Blade .
